taskDescription: Arrange the steps of CSF circulation in the correct order from production to absorption.
paragraphs: CSF is produced by the choroid plexus in the lateral ventricles
CSF flows through the foramen of Monro into the 3rd ventricle
CSF passes through the cerebral aqueduct of Sylvius in the midbrain
CSF enters the 4th ventricle between pons/medulla and cerebellum
CSF exits via foramina of Luschka (lateral) and Magendie (median) into the subarachnoid space
CSF is absorbed through arachnoid granulations into the superior sagittal sinus
